width.description: Width of the logo image in density-independent pixels (dp), converted to px at runtime. If both width and height are provided, they override the logoImageView's layout dimensions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the logo component, used to match this logo configuration with screen parameters via getComponentById lookup.

url.description: URL of the logo image to load into the logoImageView. If null or empty, the logo view is hidden (GONE).

height.description: Height of the logo image in density-independent pixels (dp), converted to px at runtime. If both width and height are provided, they override the logoImageView's layout dimensions.
